features: Three distinct scents in one collection – Ag Silver (leather woody), Ag Gold (aromatic woody), and Cu Copper (woody aromatic) – each designed to spark a positive reaction.
Ag Silver opens with violet leaf, bergamot & pepper, blending into eucalyptus, patchouli & leather, and settles on musk, cedar & amber.
Ag Gold starts with bergamot & clove, moves to jasmine, gardenia & cedarwood, and finishes with warm musk & vanilla.
Cu Copper features fresh grapefruit, bergamot & green leaves, with a heart of aquatic notes, pepper & jasmine, and a base of cedarwood, patchouli & musk.
Perfect for gifting or personal use, this trio covers every mood and occasion—from bold and refined to fresh and modern.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Previous page Next page Previous page Next page Who is Ted’s Highly Charged Gold Fragrance designed for? Ted’s Highly Charged Gold Fragrance is designed for the modern-day man who believes the devil is in the detail, showcasing an appreciation for sophistication and precision. Who is Ted’s Highly Charged Silver Fragrance designed for? Ted’s Highly Charged Silver Fragrance is designed for individuals who appreciate refinement and elegance, ensuring they make a lasting impression wherever they go. Who is Ted’s Highly Charged Copper Fragrance designed for? Ted’s Highly Charged Copper Fragrance is designed for the discerning gentleman with an eye for style and a taste for sophistication, making it the perfect choice for those who value bold and striking scents.
